prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Widow in Cabin 9
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Hallmark Possession Event
Tagline: Love lives here. So does arson.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: a child drawing stairs
Relationship dynamic: overbearing mother tension
Props: snow globe, unopened letter, casserole dish

Cast:
- Daniel Marlowe | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.2 | space=toolshed described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family

- Evelyn Hale | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=boutique owner | threat_aura=0.41 | space=marina tackle room described as old family things | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts
- Wyatt Pruitt | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Rachel Hale | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Sienna Dane is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Daniel Marlowe says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Alder Ridge.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Sienna?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Wyatt. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Daniel. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The snow globe is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Luke."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
